rows.label: tev058101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Mogugu about the giant ring in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Mogugu if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Mogugu about the floating islands in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Mogugu about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Mogugu about recent developments.

rows.label: tev058101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Mogugu hear there used to be
lots of native peoples around
here besides just Nopon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Apparently that ring was part of big
weapon that one native people used to
try and destroy other native people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Mira must have been scary place back
then! By the way, does friend agree
that ring look like gottagonut?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hmm? Friend has never heard of gottagonut? Gottagonut
is Nopon snack with hole in center that gives
jitters and makes Nopon run around in circles.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG0009
rows.name:
Mogugu left family and everything
else behind to seek out ultimate in
legendary cuisine with Tsumuji.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG0010
rows.name:
But once Growth show up, business
crawled to standstill and Mogugu
started to go hungry...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG0011
rows.name:
Soon Mogugu going to keel over and
join the stars. And then how will
Mogugu find legendary cuisine?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG0012
rows.name:
Come on, Tsumuji! Hurry up and
find legendary fluffshroom... Save
Mogugu from untimely demise...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG0017
rows.name:
Once there was incredible native
civilization that managed to
build huge kingdom in sky![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG0018
rows.name:
But then civilization lost control
of energy used to keep kingdom aloft
and SMASH! No more kingdom.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG0019
rows.name:
Islands that friend sees are all
that remain. At least, that is
what Mogugu has been told.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG0020
rows.name:
Foolish old people. If they have enough
energy to put castles in sky, they should
invest in delicious cuisine instead![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG0021
rows.name:
Think of glorious gastronomical wonders that
were lost because ancient people wanted to waste
technology on blowing selves up instead! Mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG1001
rows.name:
Tsumuji brought back LOTS of yummy
fluffshrooms for Mogugu to eat![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG1002
rows.name:
No wonder people call fluffshrooms legend.
Taste buds of Mogugu very satisfied![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG1003
rows.name:
However! ...Mogugu must continue
epic quest for delicacies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG1004
rows.name:
Mogugu is prepared to give up everything,
even life, in order to sample every
last savory substance on planet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG2001
rows.name:
In order to travel with Tsumuji
and find legendary cuisine,
Mogugu had to abandon family.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG2002
rows.name:
True, Mogugu finally got to try
legendary fluffshroom. Mogugu had
delicious culinary opportunity. Buuuut...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG2003
rows.name:
Well, look at Henahena. Henahena never
leave home, but now has lover who bring
delicious food right to Henahena every day![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG2004
rows.name:
What if Mogugu made mistake? Maybe Mogugu could have
stayed with wifeypon and still found culinary wonders.
That all Mogugu ever really want... *sniff*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058101_MSG2005
rows.name:
So be it! Mogugu going to wrap
up some fluffshrooms and bring
them home to wifeypon right now![ST:wait ]
